message:
feat(fnp-python): native testing_assert_string_equal via stdlib difflib (u98f)

Port testing_assert_string_equal out of the numpy passthrough pool. The
numpy message format is "Differences in strings:\n<difflib output>" so
we route through Python's stdlib difflib (no numpy round-trip) to keep
exact-format parity with numpy.testing.assert_string_equal. Works on
numpy-less CI workers; downstream log scrapers that grep for the
"Differences in strings:" prefix continue to match.

Also adds lines_keepends helper that mirrors Python's
str.splitlines(keepends=True) for the common \n / \r\n cases — required
because difflib.Differ.compare expects the same line tokenisation
numpy uses.

Drive-by fix: borrow value in exceptions submodule init block so the
fallback loop can both setattr it on the submodule and re-export it on
the top-level module without moving twice.

br-franken_numpy-u98f
